name: claude-brain
description: Give Claude Code persistent, photographic memory in a single portable .mv2 file. No external database required - uses a native Rust core with sub-millisecond operations, git-committable and shareable.

findings_summary.notes: Repository confirmed (309 stars, MIT, TypeScript, created Dec 2025). Well-structured with commands/ (ask.md, recent.md, search.md, stats.md), hooks/hooks.json, skills/, and .claude-plugin/. Built-in TypeScript with a Rust native core for memory operations. tsup.config.ts and tsconfig.json present. CONTRIBUTING.md available. Hooks usage means PostToolUse/PreToolUse execution - users should review hooks.json before installation. Binary distribution in dist/. No malicious patterns found. Proprietary .mv2 file format is opaque but localized.
